getBlockHash(uint256).notice: Returns the Bitcoin block hash at a specific height.

getLatestBlockHeight().notice: Returns the height of the latest block (tip of the chain).

getLatestBlockTime().notice: Returns the timestamp of the latest block, as Unix seconds.

submit(uint256,bytes).notice: Submits a new Bitcoin chain segment (80-byte headers) s
